title: OASIS 3.0.15
release_notes: ● Fixed SWIFT OAS generation: Bad Request examples are removed from SWIFT specifications even when API Portal-ready mode is selected.
● Fixed SWIFT OAS generation: SWIFT-specific cleanup is applied consistently to generated SWIFT OAS 3.0 and OAS 3.1 files.
● Added SWIFT server metadata in Preferences: each service can define server URL and description rows, with defaults for B2B, CGS, CGS-DKK, COR, FPAD, R2P, RT1, and SCT.
● Added the Service field to the Template Metadata dialog, so legacy conversion and Create Template from OAS can select the SWIFT server configuration to write into $index.xlsx.
● OAS generation now detects templates without SWIFT server rows and can update the template automatically after the user selects the related service.
● Legacy template conversion and Create Template from OAS now populate SWIFT server rows in the generated $index.xlsx when a service is selected.
● Create Template from OAS now saves and reuses the selected service together with contact, release, and filename pattern metadata.
● SWIFT server rows inserted in $index.xlsx now keep the expected template styling and merged-cell layout.
● Reduced noisy logs during conversion and template import, so relevant warnings are easier to see.
